message:
feat(supportbundle): add manifest schema for support bundle indexing

Creates internal/supportbundle package with a versioned manifest schema
for describing support bundle contents. This enables programmatic
verification of bundle integrity and provides metadata about redaction
applied to sensitive files.

Schema (v1):
- manifest.json at bundle root
- Manifest: schema_version, generated_at, ntm_version, host (os/arch), files[]
- File: path (relative), sha256 (hex), size_bytes, redaction_summary
- RedactionSummary: total findings count, counts by category

Key design decisions:
- Schema version field allows future backwards-compatible evolution
- SHA256 checksums enable integrity verification post-transfer
- Redaction summary captures counts only, never raw matched secrets
- Host info aids debugging cross-platform issues
- All paths relative to bundle root for portability

Helper functions:
- NewManifest(ntmVersion) creates skeleton with current timestamp/host
- NewFile(path, data, summary) computes checksum and size
- SummarizeRedactionFindings aggregates by category
- SHA256Hex for consistent hex encoding

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
